pi_items.source: Verified against task description, verifier.py, and export_result.sh which explicitly check for this exact dashboard name.
Verified against task description and verifier.py scoring logic which enforces at least 3 widgets for full points.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a custom dashboard specifically named 'Sales KPIs' and populating it with a minimum of 3 widgets. This is verified by checking the setup scripts, export scripts, and verifier logic which use MariaDB queries against vtiger_module_dashboards and vtiger_module_dashboard_widgets to validate these exact constraints.
